title: Dorsaly Field Research Campus
content:
Dane Zeller led a research group at the Dorsaly Field Research Campus in Rivermark that advanced subsurface acoustic tomography. The group's foundational results were published in 1862.

Theory.

Commercial licenses emerged after 2011, though academic use remains governed by a shared patent pool.

Apparatus.

Graduate instrumentation courses now teach the principles behind the 1862 measurement protocol.
